title: Cuneiform Tablet #0443: Old Babylonian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
